title: Step S-SWQT-0025: 发布新鲜度证据、完整门禁与远端状态收口

sourceFeature.href: ../feature/F-SWQT-0008-swui-mcp-渐进披露-发布新鲜度与消费端设计规范强约束.json

items.statement: 以完整门禁和四面 freshness matrix 准确证明 1.0.0 发布后的本地改进、packed 产物状态以及 npm/生产远端差异。

inScope: 完整 repository 与 packed-consumer 门禁
npm registry 和 production MCP 只读 outside-in
project companion 与 workflow evidence 收口

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: 分别采集 local source、packed nested/hoisted、npm registry 与 production MCP；任何未发布或未部署面必须明确 stale/pending，不能继承本地通过状态。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: 运行 project companion 全门禁；release-delta 清单逐项映射 6d9a637/be78477；固定 Agent walkthrough 覆盖八类误用。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: deploy-packaging -> packed consumers; public MCP -> local smoke + remote read-only probe; docs -> sync; UI -> browser; workflow -> validate/doctor。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 保留 1.0.0 远端/registry 观察作为负面对照；本地响应必须显示新合同，远端未部署时不得误报。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: 100% Feature acceptance criteria mapped to local/packed/npm/production evidence
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 没有 publish/deploy 授权时远端仍旧；真实 Agent 行为只做固定 walkthrough 与人工可复核记录。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: 取得单独授权后执行 npm publish 与 production deploy，再重复 outside-in。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 发布新鲜度矩阵把“源码已修复”和“用户已收到”分开表达。
items.problemDefinition: 1.0.0 发布后已有两次重大更新；当前生产 MCP 与 npm 包仍是旧合同，容易把本地验证误当远端事实。
items.requirementsDefinition: 建立 release-delta；运行完整 gate；验证 packed tarballs；只读查询 npm/production；更新项目 companion 的带日期事实；准确记录未授权外部动作。
nonGoals: 不把 DNS 或鉴权阻塞伪装为通过。

plainLanguage.unclear: 为什么本地全绿仍不能说任务已发布。
plainLanguage.why: npm 与生产 MCP 是独立状态面，只有真实 registry/endpoint 能证明用户收到。
plainLanguage.outcome: 最终报告明确哪些已修、哪些已打包验证、哪些仍等待发布部署。
plainLanguage.prose: 代码完成不等于分发完成；四个证据面必须分开。

options.name: 四面 freshness matrix + read-only outside-in
options.rejectWhen: 已获得发布部署授权且要求同步执行。

options.name: 仅报告本地 gates
options.impact: 简单但会漏掉核心风险。
options.rejectWhen: 用户特别关注上次发布后更新。

recommendedOption.rationale: 满足事实纪律并遵守外部发布授权边界。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: npm 与生产端点允许匿名只读观察。
recommendedOption.assumptionChanges: 若网络或鉴权失败，标为 blocked 并保留本地/packed 安全集。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 所有动作共享最终 evidence matrix 与 release freshness 不变量。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 拆开会诱发只验证一个面就宣称完成。
granularity.splitSignals: 一旦用户授权发布或部署，分别创建独立外部变更任务。

readiness.reason: 命令、证据面、状态词汇和外部写边界都明确。

forwardImpact.resolution: 记录最新 local/packed/npm/production 状态和日期。
逐条回填证据并在未授权面使用 pending/stale。

items.profileNote: full deploy-packaging verification Step；Axis positioning=local source+artifact+registry+production，split signals 保留外部写任务。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: Release delta, full CI-equivalent local gates, packed nested/hoisted packages, npm/production read-only probes, Agent walkthrough and dated companion facts.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Every Feature criterion maps to local/packed/npm/production evidence; current distribution remains explicitly stale without publish/deploy authorization.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Frozen install, docs/catalog/design/HTML, type/unit/MCP, builds, full consumer/Portal browser, packed consumers, publish dry-run/audit, workflow/doctor and outside-in probes.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: Evidence documents can be reverted independently; never revert source changes solely to make version numbers match stale distribution.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Added the 1.1.0 release delta and four-surface matrix, ran the complete local and packed validation ladder, audited publish-shaped tarballs, performed npm and production read-only probes, completed the eight-prompt Agent walkthrough, and updated companion/experience facts.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: The repository now distinguishes source, artifact, registry and deployed truth with dated, reproducible evidence.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: npm remains 1.0.0 and production MCP/Portal remain the 1.0.0 deployment because publish/deploy require separate authorization.

changeSurface.codeAnchors: All F-SWQT-0008 source changes validated through CI-equivalent gates.
changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: No data migration; registry and production operations were read-only.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Use 1.1.0 as the additive public-contract candidate; keep npm and production stale/pending labels; run browser and generated-doc gates serially to avoid known contamination.
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: The publish audit first reported a missing retained tarball prerequisite; explicit pack then audit passed, and the generated tarballs were removed after evidence capture.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: Production SPA returns HTTP 200 for /icons even though the route content is absent, so content-level browser evidence is required instead of status-code-only probing. The deploy artifact omits repository package manifests; source versions are therefore generated into .generated/release-versions.json during sync-docs and read from that deployed artifact.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: Frozen install; sync/docs, catalog, HTML, design, typecheck, unit, MCP and both builds
validationReferences.notes: 20 Portal units; 88 catalog exports, 309 package exports, 88 demos; all static/type/build gates passed.
Portal 60/60; source consumer 34 passed/6 declared skips.
1.1.0 nested and hoisted layouts each passed type/build/docs and 34 browser cases with 6 declared skips.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: publish:dry and npm publish security audit
validationReferences.notes: Both 1.1.0 packages dry-run; audit 0 blocking/4 reviewed public URL warnings.
Local 8/8 expected routes; npm and production remain 1.0.0; production lacks new resources, payload fields and Portal content.

blocker.reason: All authorized source, package-candidate and read-only remote evidence is complete.
blocker.recoveryTrigger: Explicit npm publish or production deploy authorization.
blocker.residualRisk: Users still receive 1.0.0 until those separately authorized distribution actions occur.

items.projectFactUpdateCandidates: update-now completed: companion records local 1.1.0 validation and dated npm/production 1.0.0 stale facts.

items.guardedRiskDomain: Release/version truth, publish-shaped artifacts, production MCP/Portal identity and completion claims.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Work stays within validation and evidence; R-SWQT-0002 includes current official MCP sources, baseline, post-change matrix and distribution boundary.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: compared local 1.1.0 with exact npm times/versions and live production initialize/resources/Button/Portal content.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Remote state can change after the dated observation.

gateOutcomes.evidence: All CI-equivalent static/type/build/unit/MCP gates pass; Portal 60/60; source consumer 34/6; packed nested and hoisted each 34/6; publish dry and audit pass.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: checked broad payload budget, static resource ceiling, generated docs parity, both package layouts, light/dark viewports and audit warnings.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Six skips are declared non-applicable viewport projects, not unrun product behavior; bundle-size warnings are non-blocking existing build warnings.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Release delta, Research, companion and Portal/MCP docs agree: local/packed 1.1.0 complete; npm/production 1.0.0 stale/pending.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: content-level production browser check disproved the misleading HTTP-200-only /icons signal.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: No external write was authorized, so distribution freshness remains pending by design.

items.testSufficiency: passed: 100% Feature acceptance directions map to direct static, protocol, browser, package or outside-in evidence.
items.conditionalGates: DDL not-applicable; repeated skip rollup present: 6 declared non-data-dense viewport skips repeat in source, nested and hoisted consumer matrices with the same intentional project filter.
items.projectCompanionFactDisposition: update-now completed with dated local/packed/npm/production facts.
items.ssotImpactPrerequisite: passed: release delta and companion current facts link source Workflow and authoritative package/MCP surfaces.
items.residualRisk: The deployed consumer experience remains old until separately authorized publish/deploy.
items.followUp: After authorization, publish tokens then UI, deploy Portal/MCP, and repeat outside-in checks.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0025-发布新鲜度证据-完整门禁与远端状态收口.json
items.validationSummary: All CI-equivalent gates, Portal 60/60, source consumer 34/6, packed nested+hoisted 34/6 each, publish dry-run/audit and read-only outside-in probes completed.
items.testCaseSummary: Eight Agent prompts 8/8 expected routes; MCP resources/tools/errors/budgets, Portal references, package byte parity and production negative controls are covered.
items.coverageSummary: target-driven: every F-SWQT-0008 acceptance criterion maps to source, packed, npm and production evidence; no hard gate skipped.
items.rootMount: docs/README.md -> release delta, consumer foundation contract, Portal/MCP experience and Research index.
items.evidenceInvalidationTrigger: npm publish, production deploy, registry rollback, MCP contract change or Portal content change.
items.archiveSynchronization: implemented(stable Step path; final promote and Feature lifecycle sync)

requirementAudit.evidence: release-delta-1.1.0.md maps 6d9a637, be78477 and F-SWQT-0008 to consumer-visible evidence.
requirementAudit.risk: Future commits can make the candidate stale.
requirementAudit.followUp: Refresh on release or source-contract change.

requirementAudit.evidence: Static/type/build/unit/MCP gates, Portal 60/60, source consumer 34/6 and both packed layouts 34/6 pass.
requirementAudit.followUp: Track performance separately if bundle budgets become a hard gate.

requirementAudit.evidence: Research and companion record local/packed 1.1.0, npm/production 1.0.0, content-level Portal checks and 8/8 prompt routing.

items.workflowRunAudit: All three Steps traversed design, implement, review and promote inside one auto scope with Tier-1 write evidence and validation summaries.
items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: Research, Feature breakdown, three stable Steps, package/docs/MCP source, ledger and companion facts are synchronized; final promote will derive Feature closure.
items.documentGovernanceAudit: Root docs reach the contract, release delta and Research; installed package docs remain version-locked truth; stale remote state is not presented as current source.
items.ssotProjectionAudit: Current project facts live in package/MCP source, release delta and companion; generated docs are byte-checked; npm/production remain explicitly external state.
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: Packed-consumer temp directories self-clean; explicit package tarballs created for audit were removed; workflow payload fixtures are removed after final workflow writes; unrelated files were preserved.
items.acceptanceToAuthorityPropagation: All Feature acceptance criteria propagate to package docs, MCP initialization/resources/tools, Portal references, tests, release evidence, companion facts and workflow records.
items.workflowBacklogAudit: External publish/deploy is not a hidden backlog item: it is a separately authorized follow-up with owner=swqt-maintainers, target=npm+production, trigger=explicit authorization, residual risk=users remain on 1.0.0.

closingTriad.question: Any unimplemented or unregistered Feature work?
closingTriad.answer: No within the authorized source/local/packed/read-only scope.
closingTriad.evidence: S0023-S0025 requirement audits cover every Feature acceptance criterion; publish/deploy is an explicit non-goal without separate authorization.

closingTriad.question: Are registry, ledger, Feature breakdown and stable paths aligned?
closingTriad.answer: Yes after final deterministic promotion and Feature lifecycle sync.
closingTriad.evidence: Three stable Step hrefs match the Feature breakdown; workflow promote/ledger/registry commands own synchronization.

closingTriad.question: Is behavior verified and every exception/skip classified?
closingTriad.evidence: All hard gates pass; the repeated six browser skips are declared non-applicable viewports; four audit warnings are reviewed public service URLs; remote stale state is explicit.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Source, publish-shaped artifacts, registry and production are separately proven and accurately reported.
closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditConsistency: No unrun test or unauthorized external write is claimed.
closingSelfAudit.pluginSkillFriction: Auto required explicit design goal/scope and lifecycle intents in addition to segment advances; this produced auditable transitions without bypass.
closingSelfAudit.reusableWorkflowPattern: local source + packed artifact + registry + production evidence matrix

items.requiredFollowUp: Optional and separately authorized: publish @swqt/ui-tokens@1.1.0 then @swqt/ui@1.1.0, deploy Portal/MCP, repeat outside-in.

validationSummary: All CI-equivalent gates passed; Portal 60/60; source consumer 34/6; packed nested+hoisted 34/6 each; publish dry/audit passed; npm+production remain accurately observed at 1.0.0.
